description: Section 4: Polymorphic DAG routing. Iter 1: reasoning emits code that triages 4 records via llm_query_batched, buckets by disposition, and routes fuzzy matches to a deeper comparison agent via a second llm_query_batched. Workers return triage decisions (1 exact, 1 fuzzy, 1 needs_context, 1 anomaly), then the fuzzy comparison worker returns a structured comparison. Iter 2: reasoning summarizes routed results, returns FINAL.

parts.text: {"record_id": "V-002", "disposition": "fuzzy_match", "confidence": 0.78, "rationale": "Novartis Pharma AG is likely Novartis AG with added 'Pharma' qualifier", "matched_entity_id": "E-200"}
{"record_id": "V-003", "disposition": "anomaly", "confidence": 0.25, "rationale": "Mystery Supplier matches no known entity and has empty city", "matched_entity_id": null}
{"record_id": "V-004", "disposition": "fuzzy_match", "confidence": 0.72, "rationale": "3M Healthcare is a division of 3M Company", "matched_entity_id": "E-300"}

The polymorphic DAG routing completed successfully:

- Phase 1 (Triage): 4 records classified into 3 disposition buckets
  - exact_match: 1 (V-001 Pfizer)
  - fuzzy_match: 2 (V-002 Novartis, V-004 3M)
  - anomaly: 1 (V-003 Mystery Supplier)

- Phase 2 (Routing):
  - exact_match → COMMIT (1 record)
  - fuzzy_match → comparison agent: V-002 ACCEPT (conf 0.88), V-004 HUMAN_REVIEW (conf 0.65)
  - anomaly → QUARANTINE (1 record)

FINAL(DAG routing: 1 committed, 1 accepted, 1 human_review, 1 quarantined. 0 errors.)

expected.final_answer: DAG routing: 1 committed, 1 accepted, 1 human_review, 1 quarantined. 0 errors.
